title: coptosperma supra-axillare
intro: Coptosperma supra-axillare, a plant species native to tropical Africa, is a type of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly its leaves and roots, which contain compounds with anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Coptosperma supra-axillare include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and treat various infections due to its antimicrobial properties. Traditionally, the plant is prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions for its medicinal uses.
